title: Tribunus Runtime Event
description: Schema for a single runtime event in OpenCode's event-driven execution model. Events capture actor actions, tool invocations, lifecycle transitions, and system diagnostics with normalized error codes and performance metadata.

traceId.description: W3C Trace Context trace ID for distributed tracing across subsystems

spanId.description: W3C Trace Context span ID for this event within a trace

source.description: Subsystem that emitted the event (e.g., coordination, session, tool, http, cockpit)

actor.description: Actor that generated the event (e.g., agent, user, system)

eventType.description: Type of event (e.g., tool_call, file_edit, lifecycle, error)

phase.description: Phase of the session when the event occurred

status.description: Status of the event (e.g., started, completed, failed)

toolName.description: Name of the tool called, if applicable

filePath.description: Path to the file edited, if applicable

model.description: Model used for the event, if applicable

durationMs.description: Duration of the event in milliseconds, if applicable

tokenInput.description: Number of input tokens, if applicable

tokenOutput.description: Number of output tokens, if applicable

recoverable.description: Whether the error is recoverable, if applicable

payloadJson.description: Full original event properties as a free-form JSON value
